itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival & Temple of Literature Tour
itinerary.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Check in to your hotel and visit the historic Temple of Literature, Vietnam's first national university. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Hoan Kiem Lake & Water Puppet Show
itinerary.description: Discover the heart of Hanoi by strolling around Hoan Kiem Lake and visiting Ngoc Son Temple. In the evening, attend a traditional Vietnamese Water Puppet Show. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum & Transfer to Halong Bay
itinerary.description: Visit the solemn Ho Chi Minh President Mausoleum complex. In the afternoon, transfer to Halong Bay and board a cruise ship to admire the limestone karsts. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Cruise & Departure
itinerary.description: Spend the morning cruising among the breathtaking emerald waters of Halong Bay. Transfer back to Hanoi for your onward flight. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

title: Vietnam: Cultural Discovery
description: Immerse yourself in Vietnam's rich heritage. Explore Hanoi's historic sites including the Temple of Literature and Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, enjoy a traditional Water Puppet Show by Hoan Kiem Lake, and cruise through the majestic limestone islands of Halong Bay.
highlights: Visit Hanoi's historic Temple of Literature and Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum
Enjoy a traditional Water Puppet Show in Hanoi
Walk around the peaceful shores of Hoan Kiem Lake
Cruise through the spectacular limestone karsts of Halong Bay
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change
